creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 244344
website/content/en/where.adoc additions, plus corrections to en dashes

The initial diff is for: 

website/content/en/where.adoc

From <https://lists.freebsd.org/archives/freebsd-current/2023-August/004435.html>: 

> … armv6 RPI-B images have been removed from the list of builds …

So, no armv6 amongst the plus lines in this diff. 

Also required, changes to: 

shared/releases.adoc

Re: <https://docs.freebsd.org/en/articles/freebsd-releng/#releng-website> I can't figure out what to change, or where, in releases.adoc – sorry.
